title: pyrethrum oxystegium
intro: Pyrethrum oxystegium, also known as the annual chrysanthemum or pyrethrum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum oxystegium lie in its ability to repel insects and its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Pyrethrum oxystegium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum oxystegium can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
